hero.tagline: A CAFÉ IN THE HEART OF TACHOV

about.subtitle: Our story
about.heading: About us
paragraphs: Café Ve Věži is a cozy café hidden in the historic centre of Tachov. Our space breathes history and offers a unique atmosphere where tradition meets a modern take on café culture.

We prepare specialty coffee from carefully selected roasters, homemade desserts, and offer a space for gathering, culture, and relaxation. Come sit with us — whether alone with a book or with friends.

menu.subtitle: What we offer
menu.heading: Menu
menu.description: Our menu changes with the seasons

kinedok.title: KineDok — documentary cinema
kinedok.description: We regularly screen documentary films in collaboration with the KineDok project. Come discover stories from around the world in the intimate atmosphere of our café.
kinedok.cta: Follow us on social media for the current programme

privateEvents.title: Private events
privateEvents.description: Looking for a place for a celebration, corporate meeting, or workshop? We offer space for up to 15 people with full technical equipment.
privateEvents.cta: Write to us for a free quote

reconstruction.subtitle: Transformation
reconstruction.heading: Reconstruction
reconstruction.description: From an abandoned building to a cozy cafe. See how we transformed our space.

items.name: Silvie Čermáková
items.text: Beautiful establishment, very pleasant owner who served us with a smile 10 minutes before closing time. Great Pavlova and a really funny tip with egg cognac. Perfect atmosphere.

items.name: Petr Junior Srb
items.text: Lovely lady, great coffee, desserts and canapés. Absolutely satisfied!

items.name: Ute Kohler
items.text: Very nice little café with excellent coffee and cakes.

items.name: Zuzana Procházková
items.text: The best cafe in Tachov. Great desserts and good coffee.

items.name: Lenka Popová
items.text: A great new café with a pleasant atmosphere and friendly service. On top of that, the delicious homemade desserts that are available here.

footer.copy: Café Ve Věži. All rights reserved.

meta.title: Café Ve Věži | Café in Tachov
meta.description: A cozy café in the historic centre of Tachov. Specialty coffee, homemade desserts, cultural events, and private celebrations. Visit us at K. H. Borovského 128.
meta.ogDescription: A cozy café in the historic centre of Tachov. Specialty coffee, homemade desserts, and cultural events.
